aangepast-assortiment-3.issue: Header eyebrow 'VLOOT-FUNCTIE' overlaps the 'verborgen' count text and the title 'Aangepast assortiment' sits on top of the last matrix row (M.V. Vlissingen) and overlays the legend/footer row; matrix is clipped, title not at bottom.

aangepast-assortiment-4.issue: donut lacks tick/labels beyond the single 320; minor polish only

aangepast-assortiment-5.issue: Bottom blue 'Gefilterd assortiment' panel is clipped (third item Navigatielamp SET is cut off mid-row); funnel shape over the inner panel looks decorative AI-slop and visually buries the actual filtered list.

accountbeheer-2.issue: Red square + red 'Stop sessie' text introduces an off-brand red accent not in palette (only brand blue + green permitted).

accountbeheer-4.issue: Bottom-left 'Accountbeheer' title and description overlap the matrix rows (MS Vesta row and 'Live overname' status text collide); matrix content spills past the inner panel — clear overflow and severe z-order/stacking conflict.

een-factuur-1.issue: Inner invoice panel overlaps bottom title area; title 'Één factuur.' sits beneath the dark total band, slightly tight on bottom padding.

een-factuur-4.issue: Funnel connector arrows visually clip into the dark 'Vloot factuur' bar (center anchor truncated); 'Vloot factuur' label and 'maart 2026' text too light/blue-on-blue inside the dark band, hard to read.

favorieten-3.issue: Last product row (Teak reiniger & olie set) description is clipped at the inner panel bottom edge — '2 L reiniger · 1 L olie' is cut off mid-line.

favorieten-4.issue: Popover/menu overflows the card's right edge and clips the 'Vloot-functie' eyebrow anchor; product title 'Hydraulische Besturingspo…' is also truncated behind the popover.

goedkeuringssysteem-1.issue: Inner panel rows overflow the inner card's rounded corners — last 'Goedgekeurd' pill and the green status dot clip against the panel's bottom edge; the eyebrow + check icon also crowd the first row.

goedkeuringssysteem-3.issue: 'Keur goed' / 'Wijs af' action buttons clearly bleed past the inner panel's bottom rounded edge; CTA bar visually escapes the panel.

goedkeuringssysteem-4.issue: Title/description at top-left instead of bottom-left (rule violation); 'Vloot-functie' eyebrow wrapped to two lines and rendered in ALL CAPS; '€ 1.000' and 'Routeringsregel' labels inside the navy block read as light/medium grey against deep blue — low contrast.

kwartaalcijfers-1.issue: Bar value labels (€112.800, €98.200) are quite light grey against white, slightly low contrast; minor visual noise from reference dashed line spanning all quarters.

kwartaalcijfers-3.issue: Delta indicator (▲ €2.740 t.o.v. Q4) shown as upward green for a cost increase; semantically correct that it's status-only green, but a cost rise being green-positive is mildly counterintuitive without a down-trend red option.

kwartaalcijfers-4.issue: Category labels collide with 'Werkelijk' suffix ('OnderhoudWerkelijk' runs together with no spacing); donut segment boundaries are nearly invisible — only one navy hue used, segments lack differentiation.

kwartaalcijfers-5.issue: Down-delta pills (▼ 3,1% and ▼ 5,1%) are rendered in red/orange tones which violate the 'no orange / status-only green' rule; reduce-deltas should reuse neutral or the brand palette.

oci-2.issue: 'Vloot-functie' eyebrow overlaps the right flow node (Anobel-catalogus icon), colliding with the diagram

oci-3.issue: bottom PO row (MS Vesta, €1.150) is rendered in too-light grey, near-illegible on white

oci-4.issue: left SAP card text 'MS V...' is clipped/cut off by the overlapping Verbonden pill; 'Vloot-functie' eyebrow icon (pin) renders as broken glyph

oci-5.issue: none; gauge arc and figure crisp, palette clean

orders-facturen-2.issue: timeline progress track between 'Onderweg' and 'Geleverd' renders very faintly low-contrast; minor

orders-facturen-4.issue: title 'Orders & facturen' is clipped/cut off at the bottom of the card, description and arrow CTA overflow the card, and the inner panel pushes content past the 480px tile edge

prijzen-condities-1.issue: Title 'Productgroep prijzen' sits inside the inner panel top, not on the card itself; otherwise clean, on-brand, well-readable table with clear signature instrument.

prijzen-condities-2.issue: Inner panel product title and eyebrow overlap visually (panel header sits flush with 'Vloot-functie'); otherwise strong struck-vs-personal price signature.

prijzen-condities-3.issue: Step-chart bars and X-axis tier labels (0/10/50/100) are clipped by the inner panel's bottom edge; 3D extrusion reads as gradient/AI-slop rather than flat brand blue; right-side tier caption on the short bar sits in the bar's body.

prijzen-condities-4.issue: Product title and 'Vloot-functie' eyebrow crowd each other in the inner panel header; otherwise strong personal-price + volume-progress signature.

prijzen-condities-5.issue: Minor: 'Overeenkomst' header and eyebrow 'MS Aldebaran · mrt. 2026' compete for the same top row inside the inner panel; otherwise clear terms + savings signature, green used only for status.
